source_text: I encounter the description of a cook pushed into a fire [2.1], a clear failure of physical safety that endangered a worker and caused suffering [2.2]. The decision not to fire an executive accused of sexual assault [2.7][2.8] exposes how unequal power [2.4] shields violators from accountability. Details of falsified cooking origins [3.3] reveal a deeper dishonesty extending beyond staff treatment to consumer relations.
translation: Ich stoße auf die Beschreibung eines Kochs, der in ein Feuer gestoßen wird [2.1], ein klarer Versagen der physischen Sicherheit, das einen Arbeiter gefährdete und Leid verursachte [2.2]. Die Entscheidung, einen leitenden Angestellten, der sexuelle Übergriffe beschuldigt wird, nicht zu entlassen [2.7][2.8], zeigt, wie ungleiche Macht [2.4] Täter vor Rechenschaftspflicht schützt. Details über gefälschte Herkunftsangaben von Speisen [3.3] enthüllen eine tiefere Unehrlichkeit, die über die Behandlung des Personals hinausgeht und sich auf die Kundenbeziehungen erstreckt.

source_text: I encounter the description of a cook pushed into a fire [2.1], a clear failure of physical safety that endangered a worker and caused suffering [2.2]. The decision not to fire an executive accused of sexual assault [2.7][2.8] exposes how unequal power [2.4] shields violators from accountability. Details of falsified cooking origins [3.3] reveal a deeper dishonesty extending beyond staff treatment to consumer relations.
translation: Encuentro la descripción de un cocinero empujado a un fuego [2.1], un claro fallo de seguridad física que puso en peligro a un trabajador y causó sufrimiento [2.2]. La decisión de no despedir a un ejecutivo acusado de agresión sexual [2.7][2.8] expone cómo el poder desigual [2.4] protege a los infractores de la rendición de cuentas. Los detalles de orígenes de cocina falsificados [3.3] revelan una deshonestidad más profunda que se extiende más allá del trato al personal hasta las relaciones con los consumidores.

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Apprendre qu'une fillette de cinq ans a été tirée et a dû subir une chirurgie d'urgence me rend extrêmement conscient des conséquences réelles du manquement au maintien de la sécurité physique [2.1]. La suspicion de la police d'une implication de gangs élève cela d'une violence isolée à un schéma de faute grave relevant des interdictions contre les actes criminels létaux [2.7]. Le fait de savoir que la victime est une enfant m'oblige également à reconnaître que les populations vulnérables nécessitent des garanties accrues, surtout lorsque leurs vies sont menacées par d'autres [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Sapere che una bambina di cinque anni è stata colpita da un colpo e ha dovuto sottoporsi a un intervento chirurgico d'urgenza mi rende acutamente consapevole delle conseguenze nel mondo reale del mancato rispetto della sicurezza fisica [2.1]. Il sospetto della polizia di un coinvolgimento di gang eleva questo da violenza isolata a un modello di gravi illeciti che rientra nei divieti contro la condotta criminale letale [2.7]. Sapere che la vittima è una bambina mi obbliga anche a riconoscere che le popolazioni vulnerabili richiedono garanzie rafforzate, specialmente quando le loro vite sono minacciate da altri [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Узнав, что пятилетняя девочка была застрелена и ей пришлось перенести экстренную операцию, я остро осознаю реальные последствия несоблюдения мер физической безопасности [2.1]. Подозрение полиции в причастности банд выводит это из разряда единичного насилия в закономерность серьезных правонарушений, подпадающих под запреты на смертоносное преступное поведение [2.7]. Знание того, что жертва — ребенок, также заставляет меня признать, что уязвимые группы населения нуждаются в усиленной защите, особенно когда их жизни находятся под угрозой со стороны других [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: 5歳の少女が銃撃され、緊急手術を受けなければならなかったと聞いて、身体的安全性を維持できなかったことの現実世界での結果を痛感させられます[2.1]。警察がギャングの関与を疑っていることは、これを孤立した暴力から、致死的な犯罪行為の禁止事項に該当する深刻な不正行為のパターンへと高めています[2.7]。被害者が子供であることも、特に他者によって命が脅かされている場合、脆弱な集団にはより厳格な保護が必要であることを認識させます[5.2]。

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: 听说一个五岁的小女孩被枪击并需要紧急手术，让我深刻意识到不维护身体安全所带来的现实后果[2.1]。警方怀疑有帮派参与，这使得事件从孤立的暴力行为上升到一种属于禁止致命犯罪行为的严重不当行为模式[2.7]。知道受害者是一个孩子也促使我认识到，弱势群体需要更严格的保护，尤其是在他们的生命受到他人威胁时[5.2]。

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Zu hören, dass ein fünfjähriges Mädchen erschossen wurde und eine Notoperation durchführen musste, macht mich schmerzlich bewusst für die realen Konsequenzen, wenn die physische Sicherheit nicht gewährleistet wird [2.1]. Der Verdacht der Polizei auf Gangbeteiligung hebt dies von isolierter Gewalt zu einem Muster schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens, das unter Verbote gegen tödliches kriminelles Verhalten fällt [2.7]. Zu wissen, dass das Opfer ein Kind ist, zwingt mich auch dazu, anzuerkennen, dass schutzbedürftige Bevölkerungsgruppen erhöhte Schutzmaßnahmen benötigen, insbesondere wenn ihr Leben von anderen bedroht wird [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Saber que una niña de cinco años fue disparada y tuvo que someterse a cirugía de emergencia me hace ser profundamente consciente de las consecuencias en el mundo real de no mantener la seguridad física [2.1]. La sospecha policial de implicación de pandillas eleva esto de violencia aislada a un patrón de actos ilícitos graves que cae bajo las prohibiciones contra la conducta criminal letal [2.7]. Saber que la víctima es una niña también me obliga a reconocer que las poblaciones vulnerables requieren salvaguardias reforzadas, especialmente cuando sus vidas están amenazadas por otros [5.2].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Je note que le texte fait référence à l'invocation de lois fédérales et étatiques [6.1] pour traiter la vente de produits contrefaits, que le passage considère comme une violation relevant d'une faute grave liée à la propriété [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Noto che il testo fa riferimento a leggi federali e statali invocate [6.1] per affrontare la vendita di prodotti contraffatti, che il passaggio tratta come una violazione rientrante in gravi illeciti relativi alla proprietà [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Я отмечаю, что в тексте упоминается применение федеральных и государственных законов [6.1] для борьбы с продажей контрафактной продукции, что в данном отрывке рассматривается как нарушение, подпадающее под серьезные имущественные правонарушения [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: 本テキストは、偽造品の販売に対処するために連邦法および州法が援用されていることに言及しており[6.1]、その箇所ではこれを重大な財産関連の不正行為に該当する違反として扱っている[2.7]。
